_comment: Phase 7B B.4 bake-off manifest. Each clip lists the source-language lines fed to the translator and the ground-truth English used LATER for human/BLEU scoring (the harness does not score quality). 'audio' is optional and only used by --concurrent-with-whisper. Real licensed audio clips live in clips/ (gitignored); point --manifest at a local file to add them. The text-only entries below let the harness run end-to-end (latency + tokens/sec) without committed audio.

source_text: El proyecto estará listo la próxima semana.
expected_english: Good morning, how are you today?
The project will be ready next week.

source_text: Selamat pagi, apa kabar hari ini?
expected_english: Good morning, how are you today?
The meeting will start at ten o'clock.
Good morning, how are you today?
The report will be ready tomorrow.

source_text: おはようございます、今日はお元気ですか？
会議は十時に始まります。
expected_english: Good morning, how are you today?
The meeting starts at ten o'clock.
